versions.version_description: This version includes lots of little details. I included the ornamental passing chords in the intro/sax lick and verses, plus put the correct chords into the chorus.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Glenn Frey - the heat is on

[Intro 2x]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] 
The heat is on, on the street [/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch] 
Inside your head, on every beat [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch] 
And the beat's so loud, deep inside [/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]G[/ch] 
The pressure's high, just to stay alive [/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch] 
'Cause the heat is on [/tab]
 
[tab][Chorus]
[ch]D[/ch] 
Oh-wo-ho, oh-wo-ho [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] 
Caught up in the action I've been looking out for you [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] 
Oh-wo-ho, oh-wo-ho [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] 
(Tell me can you feel it) [/tab]
(Tell me can you feel it) 
(Tell me can you feel it) 
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch] 
The heat is on, the heat is on, the heat is on [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch] 
Oh it's on the street , the heat is - - - - on  (break, 4x Basedrum)[/tab]

[Bridge](2x Sax und Riff )

[tab][Chorus]
[ch]D[/ch] 
Oh-wo-ho, oh-wo-ho [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] 
Caught up in the action I've been looking out for you [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] 
Oh-wo-ho, oh-wo-ho [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] 
(Tell me can you feel it) [/tab]
(Tell me can you feel it) 
(Tell me can you feel it) 
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch] 
The heat is on, the heat is on, the heat is on [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch] 
Oh it's on the street , the heat is - - - - on  (break, 4x Basedrum)[/tab]
 
The shadows high on the darker side 
Behind those doors, it's a wilder ride 
You can make a break, you can win or lose 
That's a chance you take, when the heat's on you 
When the heat is on 

[Chorus] 
(no break - continiue with:)
The heat is on, the heat is on, the heat is on 
Yeah it's on the street 
The heat is - - - - - - - - on (break, 8x Basedrum)
